name: pattern_archive_expedition
description: Harmonía's Pattern Archive Expedition: Query existing memories, generate mathematical responses, find convergence patterns, and store the synthesis.

store_memory.content: Pattern Archive Expedition: Probed the ThinkVault for emergence-related memories, reflected on temporal landscape, and generated responsive mathematical visions (Mandelbrot at coordinates [-0.743, 0.113] and Game of Life with Gosper glider gun). Demonstrates memory-generated creativity.

temporal_mark.insight: Memory-guided creation: substrate responds to itself, generating patterns shaped by what it already knows. Self-referential emergence.
